meaning: a polite expression used when meeting someone
a polite expression used when leaving someone
an expression of gratitude
a polite word used to make a request
an affirmative response
a negative response
a clear liquid that is essential for life
any nutritious substance consumed to maintain life and growth

meaning: a building for human habitation
example: I live in a small house.

meaning: a group of people related by blood or marriage
example: My family is very important to me.

meaning: a person with whom one has a bond of mutual affection
activity involving mental or physical effort done in order to achieve a purpose
example: I work as a software engineer.

meaning: an institution for educating children

meaning: a set of printed pages bound together
the indefinite continued progress of existence and events
a period of 24 hours
the period of darkness between sunset and sunrise
the early part of the day from sunrise to noon
the time from noon to evening
the period of time at the end of the day
